description: CompositionLight yellow printed kurta, made of 100% cotton, has short sleeves, square neck, tape detailing on sleeve hems, front neckline and upper back chest, and has split sides on the hemFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang with this light yellow kurta from w! Look ethnically hip and fresh with its square neck, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day. Team it with leggings or a loose kameez, heeled slippers and chunky accessories for a chic look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in kurtasHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
